title: CRT Software Shines Again – Over $600 Profit in Just 8 Hours
author: Cylosmagic

comments.author: AcanthisittaDull7639
comments.body: How much does a 0.1 lot position cost? Looks to me like it must be around $43000 to yield $97 from a 0.23% move

replies.author: Cylosmagic
replies.body: You're confusing notional exposure with actual cost. A 0.1 lot on XAUUSD is a contract for 10oz of gold, with leverage (like 1:100 or 1:500), the margin required to open that position is only a few hundred dollars, not $43,000. You're treating a leveraged CFD trade like a cash stock purchase. Hope that helps
